data.body:
## Full Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] bash tests/run-all.sh passes (exit 0)
  Verify: cd $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel) && bash tests/run-all.sh
- [ ] Test file exists at tests/scripts/test-bot-psychologist-agent.sh
  Verify: test -f $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/tests/scripts/test-bot-psychologist-agent.sh
- [ ] .test-index entry maps plugins/dso/agents/bot-psychologist.md to tests/scripts/test-bot-psychologist-agent.sh
  Verify: grep -q 'plugins/dso/agents/bot-psychologist.md' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/.test-index
- [ ] Tests fail (RED) because bot-psychologist.md does not exist yet
  Verify: bash $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/tests/scripts/test-bot-psychologist-agent.sh 2>&1; test $? -ne 0

## Test Assertions Spec
All 15 taxonomy items: Structured Output Collapse, Tool-Calling Schema Drift, Silent Instruction Truncation, Context Flooding, Multi-File State De-sync, Termination Awareness Failure, Multi-Step Reasoning Drift, Verbosity/Fluff Bias, Sycophancy, Brittle API Mapping, Positional Bias, Non-Deterministic Logic, Phantom Capability Hallucination, Instruction Leaking, Confidence Calibration Failure.
5 RCA probes: Gold Context Test, Closed-Book Test, Prompt Perturbation, Sycophancy Probe, State-Check Probe.
RESULT schema: ROOT_CAUSE, confidence, proposed_fixes, hypothesis_tests (sub-fields: hypothesis, test, observed, verdict).
